mentions.note: Capital equipment producer running at full capacity to meet surging demand from storage and semiconductor makers.
Semiconductor capital equipment play; focused on as sector winner alongside Lam Research.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker; $100B Micron fab will be loaded with their hardware; incredibly strong stock on equipment demand.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker profiting from memory supply shortage; but unseen global competition (Japan, Korea) also ramping capacity; must cut position after huge run.
Capital equipment maker machinery in short supply; buyers taking up stock daily; bottleneck in equipment production extends memory shortage, supports pricing power.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker; hit today on Intel pin action but I think mistaken — industry in great shape, just Intel's execution problem.
Chip equipment supplier gaining on shortage tailwinds; Intel miss provides opportunity.
Big four semiconductor capital equipment player; up 29-39% since January; benefits from Taiwan Semi guidance of 52-56B capex (vs. <45B expected) and sustained industry investment cycle.
Up 4,000% since Nov 2008 buy at $8.94; parabolic chart; Cramer would trim some here, come back on pullback; great position but time to take chips off.
Semi cap equipment; memory shortage drives business. Lower risk than direct exposure. Buy on significant pullback.
Chip manufacturing equipment supplier; AI capex boom driving scorching demand for toolmakers.
Semiconductor equipment maker; 'not a good buy, a great buy.' Lam Research and KLA also strong. Only way to alleviate chip shortages; strong IP; order them Lam, AMAT, KLA.
Two best capex plays for AI data center buildout alongside Lam Research.
Semiconductor manufacturing equipment supplier benefiting from chip shortage and expansion capex.

Greatest time in semiconductor equipment history; record earnings and revenue; 30%+ growth guidance; materials innovation leadership in leading-edge logic, DRAM, advanced packaging.
